trans-unit.note: Enum DUoM Conversion Mode - Property Caption
Enum DUoM Conversion Mode - EnumValue Fixed - Property Caption
Enum DUoM Conversion Mode - EnumValue Variable - Property Caption
Enum DUoM Conversion Mode - EnumValue AlwaysVariable - Property Caption
Table DUoM Item Setup - Property Caption
Table DUoM Item Setup - Field Item No. - Property Caption
Table DUoM Item Setup - Field Dual UoM Enabled - Property Caption
Table DUoM Item Setup - Field Second UoM Code - Property Caption
Table DUoM Item Setup - Field Conversion Mode - Property Caption
Table DUoM Item Setup - Field Fixed Ratio - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Second UoM Code cannot be the same as the base unit of measure (%1).
trans-unit.target: El código de la 2ª UdM no puede ser el mismo que la unidad de medida base (%1).
trans-unit.note: %1 = UoM Code
Table DUoM Item Setup - NamedType SameUoMErr

trans-unit.source: Second UoM Code must be specified when Dual UoM is enabled.
trans-unit.target: Debe especificarse el código de la 2ª UdM cuando la UdM Dual está habilitada.
trans-unit.note: Validation error; no placeholders.
Table DUoM Item Setup - NamedType SecondUoMRequiredErr

trans-unit.source: Fixed Ratio must be greater than zero when Conversion Mode is Fixed.
trans-unit.target: El ratio fijo debe ser mayor que cero cuando el modo de conversión es Fijo.
trans-unit.note: Validation error; no placeholders.
Table DUoM Item Setup - NamedType FixedRatioRequiredErr
Page DUoM Item Setup - Property Caption
Page DUoM Item Setup - Control General - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the item number this DUoM setup belongs to.
trans-unit.target: Especifica el número de artículo al que pertenece esta configuración UdM Dual.
trans-unit.note: Page DUoM Item Setup - Control Item No. - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies whether this item uses Dual Unit of Measure.
trans-unit.target: Especifica si este artículo utiliza Unidad de Medida Dual.
trans-unit.note: Page DUoM Item Setup - Control Dual UoM Enabled - Property ToolTip
Page DUoM Item Setup - Control Configuration - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the secondary unit of measure for this item (e.g. PCS when the base UoM is KG).
trans-unit.target: Especifica la unidad de medida secundaria para este artículo (p. ej., UDS cuando la UdM base es KG).
trans-unit.note: Page DUoM Item Setup - Control Second UoM Code - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies how the conversion ratio is determined. Fixed: constant ratio. Variable: default ratio overridable per line. Always Variable: user enters ratio manually on every line.
trans-unit.target: Especifica cómo se determina el ratio de conversión. Fijo: ratio constante. Variable: ratio predeterminado modificable por línea. Siempre variable: el usuario introduce el ratio manualmente en cada línea.
trans-unit.note: Page DUoM Item Setup - Control Conversion Mode - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the fixed or default conversion ratio (1 base UoM unit = Fixed Ratio second UoM units). Required when Conversion Mode is Fixed; used as the default in Variable mode.
trans-unit.target: Especifica el ratio de conversión fijo o predeterminado (1 unidad base UdM = ratio fijo unidades de 2ª UdM). Obligatorio cuando el modo de conversión es Fijo; se usa como predeterminado en modo Variable.
trans-unit.note: Page DUoM Item Setup - Control Fixed Ratio - Property ToolTip
Page DUoM Item Setup - Action ValidateSetup - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Checks that the current DUoM configuration is consistent and complete.
trans-unit.target: Comprueba que la configuración UdM Dual actual sea coherente y completa.
trans-unit.note: Page DUoM Item Setup - Action ValidateSetup - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.target: La configuración UdM Dual es válida.
trans-unit.note: Confirmation message; no placeholders.
Page DUoM Item Setup - NamedType SetupValidMsg

trans-unit.target: La cantidad no puede ser negativa.
trans-unit.note: Validation error; no placeholders.
Codeunit DUoM Calc Engine - NamedType NegativeQtyErr

trans-unit.source: Ratio must be greater than zero when Conversion Mode is Fixed.
trans-unit.target: La relación de conversión debe ser mayor que cero cuando el modo de conversión es Fijo.
trans-unit.note: Validation error; no placeholders.
Codeunit DUoM Calc Engine - NamedType ZeroRatioFixedErr

trans-unit.target: La relación de conversión no puede ser negativa.
trans-unit.note: Validation error; no placeholders.
Codeunit DUoM Calc Engine - NamedType NegativeRatioVariableErr

trans-unit.source: Conversion Mode %1 is not supported by the DUoM Calc Engine.
trans-unit.target: El modo de conversión %1 no está soportado por el motor de cálculo DUoM.
trans-unit.note: %1 = Conversion Mode value
Codeunit DUoM Calc Engine - NamedType UnsupportedModeErr
Caption for DUoM Second Qty field; no placeholders.
TableExtension DUoM Purchase Line Ext - Field DUoM Second Qty - Property Caption
Caption for DUoM Ratio field; no placeholders.
TableExtension DUoM Purchase Line Ext - Field DUoM Ratio - Property Caption
Caption for DUoM Second Qty field; no placeholders.
TableExtension DUoM Sales Line Ext - Field DUoM Second Qty - Property Caption
Caption for DUoM Ratio field; no placeholders.
TableExtension DUoM Sales Line Ext - Field DUoM Ratio - Property Caption
Caption for DUoM Second Qty field; no placeholders.
TableExtension DUoM Item Journal Line Ext - Field DUoM Second Qty - Property Caption
Caption for DUoM Ratio field; no placeholders.
TableExtension DUoM Item Journal Line Ext - Field DUoM Ratio - Property Caption
Caption for DUoM Second Qty field; no placeholders.
TableExtension DUoM Item Ledger Entry Ext - Field DUoM Second Qty - Property Caption
Caption for DUoM Ratio field; no placeholders.
TableExtension DUoM Item Ledger Entry Ext - Field DUoM Ratio - Property Caption
PageExtension DUoM Item Card Ext - Action DUoMSetup - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Opens the Dual Unit of Measure setup for this item.
trans-unit.target: Abre la configuración de Unidad de Medida Dual para este artículo.
trans-unit.note: PageExtension DUoM Item Card Ext - Action DUoMSetup - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the secondary quantity for this purchase line in the second unit of measure. Computed automatically in Fixed and Variable modes; enter manually in Always Variable mode.
trans-unit.target: Especifica la cantidad secundaria de esta línea de compra en la segunda unidad de medida. Se calcula automáticamente en los modos Fijo y Variable; introdúzcala manualmente en el modo Siempre Variable.
trans-unit.note: ToolTip for DUoM Second Qty field on Purchase Order Subform; no placeholders.
PageExtension DUoM Purchase Order Subform - Control DUoM Second Qty - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the conversion ratio for this purchase line. Overrides the item default when the item uses Variable conversion mode.
trans-unit.target: Especifica la relación de conversión de esta línea de compra. Reemplaza el valor predeterminado del artículo cuando utiliza el modo de conversión Variable.
trans-unit.note: ToolTip for DUoM Ratio field on Purchase Order Subform; no placeholders.
PageExtension DUoM Purchase Order Subform - Control DUoM Ratio - Property ToolTip
Default column caption for DUoM Second Qty when no second unit of measure code is available; no placeholders.
PageExtension DUoM Purchase Order Subform - NamedType DUoMSecondQtyDefaultLbl

trans-unit.source: Specifies the secondary quantity for this sales line in the second unit of measure. Computed automatically in Fixed and Variable modes; enter manually in Always Variable mode.
trans-unit.target: Especifica la cantidad secundaria de esta línea de venta en la segunda unidad de medida. Se calcula automáticamente en los modos Fijo y Variable; introdúzcala manualmente en el modo Siempre Variable.
trans-unit.note: ToolTip for DUoM Second Qty field on Sales Order Subform; no placeholders.
PageExtension DUoM Sales Order Subform - Control DUoM Second Qty - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the conversion ratio for this sales line. Overrides the item default when the item uses Variable conversion mode.
trans-unit.target: Especifica la relación de conversión de esta línea de venta. Reemplaza el valor predeterminado del artículo cuando utiliza el modo de conversión Variable.
trans-unit.note: ToolTip for DUoM Ratio field on Sales Order Subform; no placeholders.
PageExtension DUoM Sales Order Subform - Control DUoM Ratio - Property ToolTip
Default column caption for DUoM Second Qty when no second unit of measure code is available; no placeholders.
PageExtension DUoM Sales Order Subform - NamedType DUoMSecondQtyDefaultLbl

trans-unit.source: Specifies the secondary quantity for this journal line in the second unit of measure. Computed automatically in Fixed and Variable modes; enter manually in Always Variable mode.
trans-unit.target: Especifica la cantidad secundaria de esta línea de diario en la segunda unidad de medida. Se calcula automáticamente en los modos Fijo y Variable; introdúzcala manualmente en el modo Siempre Variable.
trans-unit.note: ToolTip for DUoM Second Qty field on Item Journal; no placeholders.
PageExtension DUoM Item Journal Ext - Control DUoM Second Qty - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the conversion ratio for this journal line. Overrides the item default when the item uses Variable conversion mode.
trans-unit.target: Especifica la relación de conversión de esta línea de diario. Reemplaza el valor predeterminado del artículo cuando utiliza el modo de conversión Variable.
trans-unit.note: ToolTip for DUoM Ratio field on Item Journal; no placeholders.
PageExtension DUoM Item Journal Ext - Control DUoM Ratio - Property ToolTip
Default column caption for DUoM Second Qty when no second unit of measure code is available; no placeholders.
PageExtension DUoM Item Journal Ext - NamedType DUoMSecondQtyDefaultLbl

trans-unit.source: Specifies the rounding precision for quantities in this unit of measure. Can only be changed when no item ledger entries or warehouse entries exist for this unit of measure.
trans-unit.target: Especifica la precisión de redondeo para las cantidades de esta unidad de medida. Solo puede modificarse cuando no existen movimientos de producto ni movimientos de almacén para esta unidad de medida.
trans-unit.note: ToolTip for Qty. Rounding Precision field on Item Units of Measure page extension; no placeholders.
PageExtension DUoM Item UoM Subform - Control Qty. Rounding Precision - Property ToolTip
Caption for DUoM Second Qty field; no placeholders.
TableExtension DUoM Purch. Rcpt. Line Ext - Field DUoM Second Qty - Property Caption
Caption for DUoM Ratio field; no placeholders.
TableExtension DUoM Purch. Rcpt. Line Ext - Field DUoM Ratio - Property Caption
Caption for DUoM Second Qty field; no placeholders.
TableExtension DUoM Sales Shipment Line Ext - Field DUoM Second Qty - Property Caption
Caption for DUoM Ratio field; no placeholders.
TableExtension DUoM Sales Shipment Line Ext - Field DUoM Ratio - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the secondary quantity for this posted receipt line in the second unit of measure.
trans-unit.target: Especifica la cantidad secundaria de esta línea de recepción contabilizada en la segunda unidad de medida.
trans-unit.note: ToolTip for DUoM Second Qty field on Posted Purchase Receipt Subform; no placeholders.
PageExtension DUoM Posted Purch. Rcpt. Subform - Control DUoM Second Qty - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the conversion ratio used for this posted receipt line.
trans-unit.target: Especifica la relación de conversión utilizada en esta línea de recepción contabilizada.
trans-unit.note: ToolTip for DUoM Ratio field on Posted Purchase Receipt Subform; no placeholders.
PageExtension DUoM Posted Purch. Rcpt. Subform - Control DUoM Ratio - Property ToolTip
Default column caption for DUoM Second Qty when no second unit of measure code is available; no placeholders.
PageExtension DUoM Posted Purch. Rcpt. Subform - NamedType DUoMSecondQtyDefaultLbl

trans-unit.source: Specifies the secondary quantity for this posted shipment line in the second unit of measure.
trans-unit.target: Especifica la cantidad secundaria de esta línea de envío contabilizada en la segunda unidad de medida.
trans-unit.note: ToolTip for DUoM Second Qty field on Posted Sales Shipment Subform; no placeholders.
PageExtension DUoM Posted Sales Ship. Subform - Control DUoM Second Qty - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the conversion ratio used for this posted shipment line.
trans-unit.target: Especifica la relación de conversión utilizada en esta línea de envío contabilizada.
trans-unit.note: ToolTip for DUoM Ratio field on Posted Sales Shipment Subform; no placeholders.
PageExtension DUoM Posted Sales Ship. Subform - Control DUoM Ratio - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the secondary quantity for this posted purchase invoice line in the second unit of measure.
trans-unit.target: Especifica la cantidad secundaria de esta línea de factura de compra contabilizada en la segunda unidad de medida.
trans-unit.note: ToolTip for DUoM Second Qty field on Posted Purchase Invoice Subform; no placeholders.
PageExtension DUoM Pstd Purch Inv Subform - Control DUoM Second Qty - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the conversion ratio used for this posted purchase invoice line.
trans-unit.target: Especifica la relación de conversión utilizada en esta línea de factura de compra contabilizada.
trans-unit.note: ToolTip for DUoM Ratio field on Posted Purchase Invoice Subform; no placeholders.
PageExtension DUoM Pstd Purch Inv Subform - Control DUoM Ratio - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the secondary quantity for this posted purchase credit memo line in the second unit of measure.
trans-unit.target: Especifica la cantidad secundaria de esta línea de abono de compra contabilizado en la segunda unidad de medida.
trans-unit.note: ToolTip for DUoM Second Qty field on Posted Purchase Credit Memo Subform; no placeholders.
PageExtension DUoM Pstd Purch CrM Subform - Control DUoM Second Qty - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the conversion ratio used for this posted purchase credit memo line.
trans-unit.target: Especifica la relación de conversión utilizada en esta línea de abono de compra contabilizado.
trans-unit.note: ToolTip for DUoM Ratio field on Posted Purchase Credit Memo Subform; no placeholders.
PageExtension DUoM Pstd Purch CrM Subform - Control DUoM Ratio - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the secondary quantity for this posted sales invoice line in the second unit of measure.
trans-unit.target: Especifica la cantidad secundaria de esta línea de factura de venta contabilizada en la segunda unidad de medida.
trans-unit.note: ToolTip for DUoM Second Qty field on Posted Sales Invoice Subform; no placeholders.

trans-unit.source: Specifies the conversion ratio used for this posted sales invoice line.
trans-unit.target: Especifica la relación de conversión utilizada en esta línea de factura de venta contabilizada.
trans-unit.note: ToolTip for DUoM Ratio field on Posted Sales Invoice Subform; no placeholders.
PageExtension DUoM Pstd Sales Inv Subform - Control DUoM Ratio - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the secondary quantity for this posted sales credit memo line in the second unit of measure.
trans-unit.target: Especifica la cantidad secundaria de esta línea de abono de venta contabilizado en la segunda unidad de medida.
trans-unit.note: ToolTip for DUoM Second Qty field on Posted Sales Credit Memo Subform; no placeholders.

trans-unit.source: Specifies the conversion ratio used for this posted sales credit memo line.

trans-unit.note: ToolTip for DUoM Ratio field on Posted Sales Credit Memo Subform; no placeholders.

trans-unit.source: Specifies the secondary quantity for this item ledger entry in the second unit of measure.
trans-unit.target: Especifica la cantidad secundaria de este movimiento de producto en la segunda unidad de medida.
trans-unit.note: ToolTip for DUoM Second Qty field on Item Ledger Entries page; no placeholders.
PageExtension DUoM Item Ledger Entry - Control DUoM Second Qty - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the conversion ratio used for this item ledger entry.
trans-unit.target: Especifica la relación de conversión utilizada en este movimiento de producto.
trans-unit.note: ToolTip for DUoM Ratio field on Item Ledger Entries page; no placeholders.
PageExtension DUoM Item Ledger Entry - Control DUoM Ratio - Property ToolTip

TableExtension DUoM Sales Cr.Memo Line Ext - Field DUoM Unit Price - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the unit cost in the second unit of measure. Derives Direct Unit Cost automatically when the ratio is available.
trans-unit.target: Especifica el coste unitario en la segunda unidad de medida. Calcula el Coste Directo Unitario automáticamente cuando el ratio está disponible.
trans-unit.note: ToolTip for DUoM Unit Cost field on Purchase Order Subform; no placeholders.
PageExtension DUoM Purchase Order Subform - Control DUoM Unit Cost - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the unit price in the second unit of measure. Derives Unit Price automatically when the ratio is available.
trans-unit.target: Especifica el precio unitario en la segunda unidad de medida. Calcula el Precio Unitario automáticamente cuando el ratio está disponible.
trans-unit.note: ToolTip for DUoM Unit Price field on Sales Order Subform; no placeholders.
PageExtension DUoM Sales Order Subform - Control DUoM Unit Price - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the unit cost in the second unit of measure for this posted receipt line.
trans-unit.target: Especifica el coste unitario en la segunda unidad de medida para esta línea de recepción registrada.
trans-unit.note: ToolTip for DUoM Unit Cost field on Posted Purchase Receipt Subform; no placeholders.
PageExtension DUoM Posted Rcpt. Subform - Control DUoM Unit Cost - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the unit price in the second unit of measure for this posted shipment line.
trans-unit.target: Especifica el precio unitario en la segunda unidad de medida para esta línea de envío registrada.
trans-unit.note: ToolTip for DUoM Unit Price field on Posted Sales Shipment Subform; no placeholders.
PageExtension DUoM Posted Ship. Subform - Control DUoM Unit Price - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the unit cost in the second unit of measure for this posted purchase invoice line.
trans-unit.target: Especifica el coste unitario en la segunda unidad de medida para esta línea de factura de compra registrada.
trans-unit.note: ToolTip for DUoM Unit Cost field on Posted Purchase Invoice Subform; no placeholders.
PageExtension DUoM Pstd Purch Inv Subform - Control DUoM Unit Cost - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the unit cost in the second unit of measure for this posted purchase credit memo line.
trans-unit.target: Especifica el coste unitario en la segunda unidad de medida para esta línea de abono de compra registrado.
trans-unit.note: ToolTip for DUoM Unit Cost field on Posted Purchase Credit Memo Subform; no placeholders.
PageExtension DUoM Pstd Purch CrM Subform - Control DUoM Unit Cost - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the unit price in the second unit of measure for this posted sales invoice line.
trans-unit.target: Especifica el precio unitario en la segunda unidad de medida para esta línea de factura de venta registrada.
trans-unit.note: ToolTip for DUoM Unit Price field on Posted Sales Invoice Subform; no placeholders.
PageExtension DUoM Pstd Sales Inv Subform - Control DUoM Unit Price - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the unit price in the second unit of measure for this posted sales credit memo line.
trans-unit.target: Especifica el precio unitario en la segunda unidad de medida para esta línea de abono de venta registrado.
trans-unit.note: ToolTip for DUoM Unit Price field on Posted Sales Credit Memo Subform; no placeholders.
PageExtension DUoM Pstd Sales CrM Subform - Control DUoM Unit Price - Property ToolTip
